track_traps.name: Collapsed Bridge
track_traps.desc: A partially broken bridge forces a dangerous crossing at speed.

track_traps.name: Spiked Barricade
track_traps.desc: Hidden spikes tear at the cart if not avoided in time.

track_traps.name: Loose Gravel
track_traps.desc: The wheels hit a stretch of unstable gravel.

track_traps.name: Sharp Turn
track_traps.desc: The course bends suddenly and threatens to throw the cart wide.

track_traps.name: Mud Patch
track_traps.desc: The horses struggle to keep traction through deep mud.

track_traps.name: Broken Rut
track_traps.desc: A deep rut jars the cart and threatens the frame.

track_traps.name: Fallen Crate
track_traps.desc: Debris litters the lane and must be avoided at speed.

maneuvers.name: Hairpin Death Turn
maneuvers.desc: An impossibly tight turn threatens to flip the cart entirely.

maneuvers.name: Thread the Needle
maneuvers.desc: A near-impossible gap between obstacles demands perfect control.

maneuvers.name: Tight Corner
maneuvers.desc: The cart must hug a brutal inside turn without losing control.

maneuvers.name: Narrow Gap
maneuvers.desc: The track pinches and leaves almost no room to pass cleanly.

maneuvers.name: Sudden Descent
maneuvers.desc: A sharp drop threatens to throw the cart off balance.

maneuvers.name: Chicane
maneuvers.desc: A rapid left-right sequence demands precise control.

maneuvers.name: Crowded Turn
maneuvers.desc: Several carts converge at once and force a risky line.

cart_issues.name: Axle Snap
cart_issues.desc: The axle nearly breaks under pressure and must be stabilized instantly.

cart_issues.name: Structural Collapse
cart_issues.desc: Multiple weak points give way at once, threatening total failure.

cart_issues.name: Loose Wheel
cart_issues.desc: One wheel starts to wobble dangerously under the strain of the course.

cart_issues.name: Axle Grind
cart_issues.desc: The axle screeches and threatens to seize if not stabilized.

cart_issues.name: Frame Crack
cart_issues.desc: The cart frame splinters under repeated impacts.

cart_issues.name: Shifted Weight
cart_issues.desc: The cart's balance slips and throws off its movement.

cart_issues.name: Weapon Mount Shake
cart_issues.desc: The mounted equipment rattles violently and strains the cart body.

horse_issues.name: Stampede Frenzy
horse_issues.desc: The horses panic wildly and threaten to bolt off course.

horse_issues.name: Total Breakdown
horse_issues.desc: The team loses all coordination and risks complete loss of control.

horse_issues.name: Panicked Horse
horse_issues.desc: One horse startles and threatens to break formation.

horse_issues.name: Exhausted Pull
horse_issues.desc: The team begins to drag and loses momentum under strain.

horse_issues.name: Bad Harness Pull
horse_issues.desc: One horse pulls unevenly and throws off the team’s rhythm.

horse_issues.name: Rearing Fit
horse_issues.desc: A horse rears suddenly and risks injuring itself in the chaos.

horse_issues.name: Dragged Pace
horse_issues.desc: The horses lose synchronization and the cart slows badly.
